series_metadata.series_title: Recorded Video from Highway Cameras - Other Media Copies
series_metadata.series_description: 770-2481 describes the ODOT video recording system for CCTV traffic cameras. Under that schedule electronic copies of recorded video are kept on a server for a moving three consecutive days on a moving three day period. This record schedule consists of copies of the ODOT video from the archive for distribution upon request. An electronic file copy on a PC hard drive and/or removable media will contain the selected recorded video.
